notes: Products marked has_full_details=false are from the brochure only and need descriptions, ingredients, and pricing filled in.
Variants array collapses weight-based SKUs (e.g. Chicken Pickle 250g and 1kg) under a single product.
'Avise Ginjala Karam Podi' (brochure) and 'Avisaginjala Karam Podi' (detailed JSON) were merged as the same product.

NRI and Clothing categories were added as a schema-compatible expansion. Each new product uses the same blank-details template as brochure-only items (description/ingredients/variants/pricing to be filled in). Categories carry an optional 'group' field ('nri' or 'clothing') to allow filtering in the UI.

categories.name: Karam Podis
categories.description: Traditional Andhra spice-and-lentil powders, freshly ground with no preservatives.

products.name: Nalla Karam Podi
products.description: Homemade black‑gram spice powder prepared with hygienic methods and traditional taste using fresh ingredients.

products.name: Nuvvula Karam Podi
products.description: Homemade sesame spice powder rich in protein and healthy fats.

products.name: Munagaku Karam Podi
products.description: Homemade moringa (drumstick leaves) spice powder prepared with fresh curry leaves and lentils.

products.name: Avise Ginjala Karam Podi
products.description: Flaxseed‑based spice powder that promotes heart health and helps with weight management.

products.name: Putnala Podi
products.description: Protein‑rich roasted Bengal‑gram powder for seasoning and condiments.

products.name: Senagappu Karam Podi
products.description: Bengal‑gram spice powder rich in protein and fibre.

categories.name: NRI Special Products

categories.name: International Shipping
categories.description: Products available for global shipping to NRI customers. Includes Chicken Pickle (250g / 1kg), all Karam Podis, Masala Powders, and Ready Mix items.

categories.name: NRI Combo Packs
categories.description: Themed combo packs — Andhra, breakfast, spice, and snacks — assembled for NRI households missing home flavours.

categories.description: Ready-to-ship gift packs for festivals, celebrations, and milestone occasions abroad.

categories.description: Festival-special packs timed for Diwali, Sankranti, and Ugadi delivery to international addresses.

categories.name: Virtual Shopping Service
categories.description: Assisted shopping service — place custom grocery, family, or festival orders remotely and have them delivered to your home or family.
